message:
fix(layout): remove unreachable catch-all arms in drag resize machine

Remove two unreachable match arms in PaneDragResizeMachine's keyboard and
wheel resize handlers. The Armed/Dragging catch-all patterns returned
IdleWithoutActiveDrag noop, but all valid Armed/Dragging variants are
already matched by preceding arms—making these dead code. Also suppresses
an unused variable warning for 'current' in the Armed→Dragging PointerMove
transition (origin is the reference point, not current).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
